name: fnvhash

metadata.name: fnvhash
classifiers: Topic :: Software Development :: Libraries :: Python Modules

documentation:
# Pure Python FNV hash implementation

```{image} https://travis-ci.org/znerol/py-fnvhash.svg?branch=master
:target: https://travis-ci.org/znerol/py-fnvhash
```

Pure Python implementation of the [FNV] hash family with 100% test coverage.
Take a look at [pyhash] for use cases where performance is more important than
portability.

## Usage

```
>>> from fnvhash import fnv1a_32
>>> hex(fnv1a_32(b'foo'))
'0xa9f37ed7'
```

## License

The software is subject to the MIT license.

[fnv]: http://isthe.com/chongo/tech/comp/fnv/
[pyhash]: https://pypi.python.org/pypi/pyhash

modules.name: fnvhash
documentation:
Implementation of Fowler/Noll/Vo hash algorithm in pure Python.

See http://isthe.com/chongo/tech/comp/fnv/

functions.name: fnvhash.fnv
documentation: Core FNV hash algorithm used in FNV0 and FNV1.

functions.name: fnvhash.fnva
documentation: Alternative FNV hash algorithm used in FNV-1a.

functions.name: fnvhash.fnv0_32
documentation: Returns the 32 bit FNV-0 hash value for the given data.

functions.name: fnvhash.fnv1_32
documentation: Returns the 32 bit FNV-1 hash value for the given data.

functions.name: fnvhash.fnv1a_32
documentation: Returns the 32 bit FNV-1a hash value for the given data.

functions.name: fnvhash.fnv0_64
documentation: Returns the 64 bit FNV-0 hash value for the given data.

functions.name: fnvhash.fnv1_64
documentation: Returns the 64 bit FNV-1 hash value for the given data.

functions.name: fnvhash.fnv1a_64
documentation: Returns the 64 bit FNV-1a hash value for the given data.
